canonical_name: coordination mutation, lease, and policy helpers
summary: prism-coordination modules that apply coordination mutations and enforce lease lifecycle, resume/reclaim, heartbeat, rejection recording, and shared policy/conflict helpers.
evidence: `mutations.rs` now applies authenticated coordination transitions together with lease-aware rejection, resume, reclaim, and heartbeat semantics.
`lease.rs` and shared helpers centralize holder comparison, due-state evaluation, lease refresh, and policy evidence used by coordination mutations.
risk_hint: If mutation or lease helpers drift, stale or expired work can be renewed incorrectly, valid resumptions can be rejected, and ownership can be attributed to the wrong principal.
